name: JIVE TURKEY
author: Sean McCormick
description: Deliberately loud 70s GRAMOFSMACK skin. A 3-across square grid over an animated flat-graphic background — kaleidoscope, flower field, racing-stripe ribbons, sunburst daisy, Bauhaus shuffle — that never sits still, with SURPRISE rolling a fresh look every visit and a colour border cycling across the tiles. Maximalist on purpose; the photos still win.

jt_palette.label: Colourway

options.BARF: BARF — piss yellow / avocado / earth brown
options.BLECH: BLECH — purple / burnt orange / shag gold
options.HARVEST: HARVEST — harvest gold / burnt orange / brown

jt_palette.hint: The 70s colourway. Drives the background AND the tile borders. Ignored when Both Barrels is on. Colourways live in jive-turkey-config.php.

jt_mode.label: Background Mode

options.solid: SOLID — plain background colour, no animation

jt_mode.hint: Pick one look, or let SURPRISE / CYCLE rotate them.

jt_scrolls_axis.label: Scrolls Direction

options.random: Random — a different one of the 8 each visit

jt_scrolls_axis.hint: Only affects SCROLLS: which way the striped ribbons travel — any of 8 directions (up/down/left/right and the four diagonals), or let RANDOM pick one each visit. The scrolls slide off one edge and reappear on the other.

jt_scrolls_colour.label: Scrolls Colour Drift

options.fade: Fade — colours drift slowly through the palette
options.blink: Blink — colours switch on a beat

jt_scrolls_colour.hint: Only affects SCROLLS: let the ribbon colours cycle through the colourway. Fade crossfades gracefully; Blink switches on a beat; Off holds still. The field and the pale centre-line stay put either way.

jt_random_colour.label: Both Barrels

options.1: On — random colourway each visit too

jt_random_colour.hint: With SURPRISE / CYCLE, also randomise the colourway each visit. The tile borders follow automatically.

jt_speed.label: Background Speed
jt_speed.hint: Background animation speed — affects ALL modes: SCOPE, BLOOM, FLOW, DAISY, REELS.

jt_cycle_time.label: Cycle Dwell
jt_cycle_time.hint: Seconds each mode holds before CYCLE moves on.

jt_border_on.label: Tile Borders
jt_border_on.hint: A colour band OUTSIDE each tile, in the gutter (never over the photo, image never resizes). It shrinks in to nothing, flips to the next colourway colour, then pops back out — staggered across the grid as a wave.

jt_border_width.label: Border Width
jt_border_width.hint: Full width of the colour band (it grows outward into the tile gutter, never over the photo). Reserved as grid padding so the grid stays within the standard Instagram column width. The band shrinks to 0 and back on each colour change.

jt_border_speed.label: Colour-Change Speed
jt_border_speed.hint: How fast the border cycles colour. Higher = faster.

jt_border_wave.label: Wave Stagger
jt_border_wave.hint: How much the colour change staggers across the grid as a travelling wave.

jt_border_trans.label: Transition Length
jt_border_trans.hint: How long the shrink-in / pop-out takes on each colour change. Higher = slower and easier to see; the band always rests at full width between changes.

jt_gap.label: Tile Spacing
jt_gap.hint: Pure background gap between tiles, measured border-edge to border-edge. The colour border sits INSIDE each tile (the photo shrinks to make room), so this spacing is exactly what you set: 20px spacing is always 20px of background, whatever the border width. The grid stays within the standard Instagram column width.

jt_nav_tile_gap.label: Nav-to-Tiles Gap
jt_nav_tile_gap.hint: Vertical space between the sticky nav bar and the top row of tiles.

jt_footer_gap.label: Space Above Footer
jt_footer_gap.hint: Vertical gap between the bottom row of tiles and the footer.

jt_footer_color.label: Footer Background Colour
jt_footer_color.hint: Footer bar background. Shows only when Footer Opacity is above 0; otherwise the footer follows the panel / background.

jt_footer_opacity.label: Footer Opacity
jt_footer_opacity.hint: 0 = follow the panel / background (default). Raise for a solid footer bar.

jt_navbar_color.label: Navbar Colour
jt_navbar_color.hint: Background colour of the sticky nav bar. PHP-handled → --jt-navbar-bg.

jt_navbar_opacity.label: Navbar Opacity — Landing
jt_navbar_opacity.hint: Landing page only. 0 = transparent. Raise for a solid bar over the jive-turkey.

jt_navbar_opacity_inner.label: Navbar Opacity — Other Pages
jt_navbar_opacity_inner.hint: Archive / post / static pages. Leave blank to match the Landing value.

jt_nav_line_color.label: Nav Line Colour
jt_nav_line_color.hint: Colour of the divider lines above and below the sticky nav. Ignored when Nav Line Mode follows the wave.

jt_nav_line_mode.label: Nav Border Lines

options.jive-turkey: Jive Turkey wave (shifts with the tile borders)

jt_nav_line_mode.hint: Jive Turkey mode tracks the live border wave colour.

jt_nav_line_opacity.label: Nav Line Opacity
jt_nav_line_opacity.hint: Opacity of the nav divider lines (both the bright rule and its companion).

jt_nav_underline.label: Nav Line Under-line
options: On — dark indigo line tucked under each nav line
jt_nav_underline.hint: The decorative second line under each nav divider. Off by default.

jt_nav_glow_color.label: Nav Glow Colour
jt_nav_glow_color.hint: Outer glow behind the menu links (home / blogroll / pages).

jt_posts_color.label: Posts Colour
jt_posts_color.hint: Colour of the post-count number and the "posts" label. PHP-handled -> --post-count-color.

jt_posts_glow_size.label: Posts Glow Size
jt_posts_glow_size.hint: 0 = no glow (falls back to the profile text glow).

jt_panel_color.label: Panel Colour
jt_panel_color.hint: Backing colour behind the content column on every page so it reads over the jive-turkey. PHP-handled → --panel-bg.

jt_panel_opacity.label: Panel Opacity
jt_panel_opacity.hint: 0 = transparent (the jive-turkey shows through). Raise until text is comfortable to read.

jt_panel_extend.label: Panel Extend (gutters)
jt_panel_extend.hint: How far the panel bleeds out past the content each side. 0 = flush, 100 = 100px gutters.

skin_avatar.label: Profile Avatar
skin_avatar.hint: Square image recommended. Displayed as a circle, ~77px.

jt_bio_color.label: Description / Bio Text
jt_bio_color.hint: Colour of the bio paragraph under the profile. Independent of Secondary Text.

jt_solo_backdrop_source.label: Backdrop Source

options.skin: Skin — the animated background shows through

jt_solo_backdrop_source.hint: What sits behind the open post. The Scrim (below) tints or covers it.

jt_solo_backdrop_image.label: Backdrop Image
jt_solo_backdrop_image.hint: Used when Backdrop Source = Image. Minimum 1920×1080px.

jt_solo_scrim_color.label: Scrim Colour
jt_solo_scrim_color.hint: The colour layer over the backdrop. Pair with Scrim Opacity.

jt_solo_scrim_opacity.label: Scrim Opacity
jt_solo_scrim_opacity.hint: 0 = backdrop fully visible; 100 = solid Scrim Colour behind the photo. Default 80%.

jt_solo_card_color.label: Card Colour
jt_solo_card_color.hint: The modal colour around the image and behind the caption panel. Blank = follow Image Page Background.

jt_solo_pad.label: Image Padding
jt_solo_pad.hint: Space around the image inside the card. The caption panel reflows to fit.

jt_solo_text_color.label: Card Text — Primary
jt_solo_text_color.hint: Caption, username, EXIF values. Blank = follow Primary Text.

jt_solo_text_secondary_color.label: Card Text — Secondary
jt_solo_text_secondary_color.hint: EXIF labels, date, meta. Blank = follow Secondary Text.

jt_glow_color.label: Text Glow Colour
jt_glow_color.hint: Halo colour behind title, tagline, and bio. Black for dark glow; white for light glow.

jt_glow_size.label: Text Glow Size
jt_glow_size.hint: 0 = no glow. Increase for a wider halo.

options.per_carousel: Per Post (each post defines its own style)
options.per_image: Per Image (each photo has its own style)

jt_treatment_mode.label: Background Treatment
jt_treatment_mode.hint: Optional. A treatment sits in front of the jive-turkey layer — leave on None to let the jive-turkey show.

jt_treatment_image.label: Treatment Image
jt_treatment_image.hint: Used when Treatment = Background image. Minimum 1920×1080px.

jt_treatment_overlay.label: Overlay  (left darkens · right lightens)
jt_treatment_overlay.hint: Centre = none. Drag left to darken the background, right to lighten it.
